eventbrite.name: Eventbrite
eventbrite.tagline: A simpler, more affordable alternative to Eventbrite with zero platform fees.
eventbrite.description: Compare Event Schedule with Eventbrite to keep 100% of your ticket revenue: zero platform fees vs 3.7% + $1.79 per ticket, plus open source and AI tools.
eventbrite.keywords: eventbrite alternative, eventbrite alternative free, free event platform, no platform fees ticketing, eventbrite competitor
eventbrite.about: Eventbrite is one of the largest event ticketing platforms, widely used for conferences, festivals, and community events. It offers a comprehensive suite of tools for event promotion and ticket sales.
competitor_strengths: Large marketplace with built-in event discovery and audience
Comprehensive event promotion and marketing tools
Established brand with wide consumer recognition

Unique Features: AI suite (event parsing, flyer gen, style gen)

key_advantages.title: 0% Platform Fees
key_advantages.description: Eventbrite charges 3.7% + $1.79 per ticket. With Event Schedule, you keep 100% of your revenue minus standard Stripe processing.

key_advantages.title: Custom Domain
key_advantages.description: Use your own domain for your event pages. Eventbrite does not offer custom domain support at any price.

key_advantages.title: AI Event Parsing
key_advantages.description: Paste event details in any format and our AI extracts all the details automatically. Unique to Event Schedule.

key_advantages.title: Open Source
key_advantages.description: Fully open source with no vendor lock-in. Selfhost on your own server instead of depending on Eventbrite's platform and fee structure.

key_advantages.title: Calendar Sync
key_advantages.description: Two-way Google Calendar and CalDAV sync included free. Eventbrite lacks native two-way calendar sync.

key_advantages.title: Eventbrite Auto-Import
key_advantages.description: Connect your Eventbrite account and import all your events in one click. Event details, tickets, venues, and images are transferred automatically.

auto_import.title: Bring your Eventbrite events with you
auto_import.description: Connect your Eventbrite account and import all your events in one click. No manual data entry or copy-pasting needed.

steps.title: Connect your account
steps.description: Link your Eventbrite account with one click.

steps.title: Select your events
steps.description: Browse your Eventbrite events and choose which to import.

steps.title: Import instantly
steps.description: All details, tickets, venues, and images transfer automatically.

why_choose.summary: Event Schedule gives you everything Eventbrite offers for ticketing, plus features Eventbrite lacks, all without platform fees eating into your revenue.
points: Zero platform fees vs Eventbrite's 3.7% + $1.79 per ticket
One-click Eventbrite import brings your events, tickets, and venues over automatically
Custom domains and full branding control that Eventbrite doesn't offer at any price
AI-powered event parsing, flyer generation, and two-way Google Calendar sync

switch_steps.title: Create your schedule
switch_steps.description: Sign up free and create your first schedule in under a minute.

switch_steps.title: Add your events
switch_steps.description: Import your events directly from Eventbrite, use AI import, or create events manually.

switch_steps.title: Share and sell
switch_steps.description: Share your schedule URL and start selling tickets.

faq.question: Can I import my existing Eventbrite events?
faq.answer: Yes. With the Pro plan, you can connect your Eventbrite account and import your events in bulk. Event details, ticket types, venues, and images are all transferred automatically.

faq.question: Is it easy to switch from Eventbrite to Event Schedule?
faq.answer: Yes. There is no need to migrate your Eventbrite history. Create a free schedule, add your upcoming events (or use AI import to paste and parse them), and share your new schedule URL with your audience.

faq.question: How does Event Schedule pricing compare to Eventbrite?
faq.answer: Eventbrite charges 3.7% + $1.79 per ticket on paid events. Event Schedule charges zero platform fees at every plan level. The Pro plan is a flat $5/mo regardless of how many tickets you sell.

faq.question: Does Event Schedule have an event marketplace like Eventbrite?
faq.answer: Event Schedule focuses on giving organizers their own branded schedule pages rather than a shared marketplace. You get a dedicated URL, custom domain support, and embeddable calendar widgets to drive discovery from your own channels.

faq.question: Is it easy to switch from Ticket Tailor to Event Schedule?
faq.answer: Yes. If you are familiar with Ticket Tailor, Event Schedule will feel natural. Create a free schedule, set up your ticket types, and connect Stripe. The ticketing workflow is straightforward and you can be selling tickets within minutes.

faq.question: How does Event Schedule pricing compare to Ticket Tailor?
faq.answer: Ticket Tailor charges per ticket sold. Event Schedule Pro is a flat $5/mo with zero platform fees, no matter how many tickets you sell. This makes costs predictable and lower for most organizers.

faq.question: What does Event Schedule offer that Ticket Tailor does not?
faq.answer: Event Schedule is open source and supports selfhosting, giving you full control over your data. It also includes AI event import, two-way Google Calendar sync, built-in newsletters, and fan engagement features that Ticket Tailor does not offer.

faq.answer: Event Schedule has a generous free plan that includes unlimited events, Google Calendar sync, newsletters, and team collaboration. The Pro plan at $5/mo adds ticketing, QR check-ins, and custom branding.

faq.question: Can Event Schedule handle ticketing that Google Calendar cannot?
faq.answer: Yes. Google Calendar has no ticketing features. Event Schedule Pro includes full ticketing with QR check-ins, a live dashboard, ticket waitlists, sale notifications, and sales CSV export. All with zero platform fees.

faq.question: How does Event Schedule pricing compare to Meetup?

faq.answer: Yes. Event Schedule supports recurring events, fan engagement features like videos and comments, newsletters with A/B testing, and embeddable calendar widgets. All designed for building and maintaining community.

faq.question: How does Event Schedule pricing compare to Brown Paper Tickets?
faq.answer: Brown Paper Tickets charges $0.99 + 5% per ticket as a buyer-paid service fee. Event Schedule charges zero platform fees at any plan level. The Pro plan is a flat $5/mo for unlimited ticketing with direct Stripe payouts.

faq.answer: Yes. Unlike Accelevents, there is no enterprise onboarding or implementation process. Sign up, create a free schedule, and start adding events immediately. AI import can parse pasted event details to speed things up.

faq.question: How does Event Schedule pricing compare to Accelevents?
faq.answer: Accelevents starts at $7,000/year with additional per-ticket fees ($1 + 1%) on paid plans. Event Schedule Pro is a flat $5/mo with unlimited events and zero platform fees.

faq.question: Can Event Schedule handle virtual and hybrid events like Accelevents?
faq.answer: Yes. Event Schedule supports online events with video links and integrates with any streaming platform. Combined with ticketing, QR check-ins, and newsletters, it covers both virtual and in-person needs.

faq.answer: Yes. Pretix selfhosting requires Docker, PostgreSQL, Redis, and significant server administration. Event Schedule runs on standard PHP hosting with MySQL, making it accessible to a much wider range of hosting environments.
